title: Session Log Entry
description: One line of ~/.claude/plugins/data/vibe-cartographer/sessions/<date>.jsonl. Two entry shapes share a sessionUUID: a sentinel entry (outcome=in_progress) written at command start, and a terminal entry written at command end. The orphan detector pairs them by (command, project_dir, sessionUUID).

sentinelEntry.title: Sentinel entry
sentinelEntry.description: Written by session-logger.start() at command invocation. Smaller field set than the terminal entry — no outcome data exists yet.

timestamp.description: ISO datetime when the command started.

sessionUUID.description: UUID v4 issued by session-logger.start(). The terminal entry, any friction.jsonl entries, and any calibration entries from this session all carry this same UUID.

outcome.description: Sentinel marker. detect_orphans() looks for sentinels older than 24h with no matching terminal entry.

terminalEntry.title: Terminal entry
terminalEntry.description: Written at command end. Carries the same sessionUUID as its sentinel. Holds outcome metadata, friction notes, key decisions, and complement attribution.

timestamp.description: ISO datetime when the command ended.

outcome.description: Terminal outcome. 'completed' is the happy path; 'abandoned' should be rare in terminal entries (orphan sentinels are the usual signal); 'error' for caught failures; 'partial' for command that ran some steps then user opted to stop.

user_pushback.description: True if the user contradicted, redirected, or rejected the agent during the run.

friction_notes.description: Inline notes captured during the command. Friction entries are also written to friction.jsonl; this field is for human-facing recap in /reflect.

key_decisions.description: Notable forks the user made during the command.

artifact_generated.description: Path of the artifact this command produced (e.g. 'docs/scope.md'). Null when the command produces no artifact.

complements_invoked.description: Pattern #13 complement skills that ran during this session.
